result.stdout:
Description:
  DynamicApiClientGen CLI Tool

Usage:
  DynamicApiClientGen.CLI [options]

Options:
  --input <input>    Input Swagger/OpenAPI file path or URL
  --output <output>  Output C# file path
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
